description: Combined dashboard: gift-finder ATC + top-models leaderboard + a headline 'Cost of an Outage' row that turns k3s downtime into dollars. Tune `avg_atc_value` and `outage_hours` at the top.

panels.title: 💸 Cost of an Outage — what k3s downtime cost the business

options.content:
### 💸 Cost of an outage — read me first

1. **Baseline** = p75 of hourly loadgen cart-add count over the last 7 days. A typical busy hour — high, but not your peak.
2. **Loss rate ($/hr)** = baseline × `$avg_atc_value` (avg cart-add USD).
3. **Cost of outage** = loss rate × `$outage_hours` (k3s downtime).

> Tune `avg_atc_value` and `outage_hours` at the top to drive the numbers live.
> *Catalog avg is ~$600; gift-finder personas mostly state $80–$300 budgets, so $150 is the demo default.*

panels.title: 💸 Cost of the outage
panels.description: Estimated lost revenue while k3s couldn't drive load: p75 of hourly cart-adds × ${avg_atc_value}/cart-add × ${outage_hours} hours.

panels.title: 💵 Loss rate (USD / hour)
panels.description: What every hour of downtime costs. p75 of last-7d hourly cart-adds × ${avg_atc_value}.

panels.title: ⏱ Outage duration
panels.description: How long k3s was down. Adjust via the `outage_hours` variable.

panels.title: 💰 Avg cart-add value
panels.description: Assumed $ per cart-add. Adjust via the `avg_atc_value` variable.

panels.title: 🖥 k3s node Ready status — when this drops, no loadgen, no ATC, no revenue
panels.description: Each row = one k3s node. Green = Ready, Red = NotReady. NotReady gaps coincide with loadgen halts → flat ATC → lost revenue.

panels.title: 🤖 k6 loadgen pod state — restarts and failures show as colour breaks
panels.description: Each row = one k6-traffic pod incarnation. Green = Running, Red = Failed/Pending. Every break = a window where no synthetic shoppers were driving carts.

panels.title: 📉 Loadgen ATC $/hour — flat spots = lost revenue
panels.description: Loadgen cart-add throughput in USD/hour (5m rate × 3600 × ${avg_atc_value}). When this line flatlines, k3s/loadgen was down — and your `cost of outage` above is the gap.

panels.title: ATC events (last 1h)
panels.description: Total add-to-cart events triggered in the last hour, across all conversations and models.

panels.title: ATC by model — last 1h
panels.description: How many add-to-carts each underlying model produced.

targets.expr: sum by (model) (count_over_time({service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event" | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> <_>` [1h]))

panels.title: ATC rate — by model (% of total)
panels.description: Each model's share of add-to-cart events as a percentage of all ATCs.

panels.title: Top conversations — ATCs per persona
panels.description: Which shoppers added the most items in the last hour.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (persona) (count_over_time({service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event" | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> persona=<persona> <_>` [1h])))

panels.title: Top products added (by SKU)
panels.description: Most-added SKUs in the last hour.

targets.expr: topk(15, sum by (sku) (count_over_time({service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event" | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> <_>` [1h])))

panels.title: 🏆 Best models — composite ranking (ATC × Cost × Performance × Quality)
🏁 Top Models leaderboard — composite score (24h)
panels.description: Composite: 40·atc_rate + 30/(1+1000·cost_per_conv) + 15/(1+p95) + 15·quality_0_1. Sort by any column.

targets.expr: sum by (model) (count_over_time({service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event" | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> <_>` [24h]))

sum by (model) (count_over_time({service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event" | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> <_>` [24h]))

sum by (model) (count_over_time({service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event" | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> <_>` [24h]))

panels.title: 📈 Per-model trends — ATC, cost and latency
🛒 ATC events/sec per model
panels.description: Add-to-Cart events per second per model (5m sliding window). Watch winners climb.

targets.expr: sum by (model) (rate({service_namespace="observibelity",container="tool"} |~ "atc_event" | pattern `<_>atc_event source=<source> product_id=<pid> sku=<sku> qty=<qty> agent_name=<agent> model=<model> <_>` [5m]))

panels.title: 💰 Cost per second per model
panels.description: USD/sec spend per model (5m rate). Multiply by 3600 for USD/hour.

panels.title: ⏱ P95 latency per model
panels.description: p95 latency per model — 95% of requests finish faster than this line.

panels.title: 🎯 Response Quality — heuristic eval per turn
Quality pass rate (last 1h)
panels.description: Share of gift-finder turns scored ≥3 candidates, ≥1 within budget, named in reply. <70% = agent drifting.

panels.title: Pass vs. fail over time
panels.description: Rolling pass/fail trend. Catches LLM-agent drift before users do.

panels.title: Total turns evaluated (1h)
panels.description: Number of gift-finder turns scored by the heuristic eval in the last hour.

panels.title: Fail reasons by model — last 1h
panels.description: Why eval fails: missing_products / over_budget / reply_no_product_mention.

targets.expr: sum by (model, reason) (count_over_time({service_namespace="observibelity",container="specialist"} |~ "nc_gift_finder_quality result=fail" | pattern `<_>nc_gift_finder_quality result=<result> reason=<reason> model=<model> <_>` [1h]))

panels.title: Per-model quality scorecard (last 1h)
panels.description: Pass count + fail count + pass-rate for each model.

targets.expr: sum by (model, result) (count_over_time({service_namespace="observibelity",container="specialist"} |~ "nc_gift_finder_quality" | pattern `<_>nc_gift_finder_quality result=<result> reason=<reason> model=<model> <_>` [1h]))

title: AI Obs — Outage Cost (ATC × Models × Quality)
